prompt: Cài Khuym cho tôi trên cả Codex, Factory Droid và Kiro. Sau đó chỉ luôn bước bootstrap để tôi đi vào full workflow.
expected_output: Chia thành 3 phần theo platform dưới Install steps, có top-level template rõ ràng, nêu đúng lệnh hoặc UI path cho từng cái, rồi kết thúc bằng handoff sang using-khuym và full workflow routing.

assertions.text: Covers all three platforms: Codex, Factory Droid, and Kiro.
Uses the top-level headings Chosen platform, Chosen scope, Install steps, and Bootstrap next step.
Uses nested platform sections for Codex, Factory Droid, and Kiro inside Install steps.
Includes concrete install instructions for each platform.
Tells the user the next bootstrap step is using-khuym.
Mentions the full Khuym workflow chain after bootstrap.
